title: Copy of column onto another board
excerpt:
Hi All, 
I have 3 columns on a board and I want to copy these onto a backlog board, how can I do this making sure that when new items are created they are then copied into the other board ?

posts.author: jo.mistry (jo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi All,
I have 3 columns on a board and I want to copy these onto a backlog board, how can I do this making sure that when new items are created they are then copied into the other board ?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @jo.mistry!

In order to achieve this, you’d need to set up this specific automation recipe…

Screen Shot 2023-04-12 at 11.30.47 am862×478 18.3 KB

and ensure that you have the same type of columns existing in your backlog board, so that you can map the columns from each board seamlessly - i.e. status column with status column, people column with people column, etc…

Screen Shot 2023-04-12 at 11.30.26 am1324×1058 76.6 KB

Let me know if this makes sense!

posts.author: Aaron_H (Aaron Hieb)
posts.cookedHtml: I don’t think this addresses the question, or mine. I simply want to have the same column information in one sheet that is used in another sheet, but the sheets are in no way linked to one another. How do I copy content in a row or column from one sheet to another without having to copy/paste text over an over?
